para_trans: The Government has also directed that the additional expenditure arising out of the revised pay structure implemented under this order shall be incurred under the head of accounts for which the salaries and allowances of teaching and non-teaching staff are incurred.
3. Accordingly, the Commissioner, Divyang Kalyan, Pune directed the Department to set up Shri Sant Gajanan Maharaj Educational Institute, Oroli.
